title: lastrea euaensis
intro: Lastrea euaensis, also known as Eua fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastrea euaensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed fresh or dried, or applied topically to the skin for its therapeutic benefits.
